name: Feather Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in warm water.
2. Stir the yeast mixture into buttermilk; mix well and set aside.
3. Combine flour and sugar; cut in shortening until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
4. Add the buttermilk mixture; stir until dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled. Alternatively, cover the bowl tightly and store in the refrigerator until needed (dough may be stored up to 3 days).
6. Punch down the dough; turn it out on a lightly floured surface.
7. Knead lightly 3 or 4 times.
8. Roll dough to 1/2 inch thickness; cut with a 2-inch biscuit cutter.
9. Place biscuits on lightly greased baking sheets.
10. Bake at 450 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
